title: JDBC 2.27 fails with year < 1000
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_date DATE NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date) VALUES (2, NULL);
SELECT id, event_date FROM test_dates WHERE event_date IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, event_date FROM test_dates WHERE event_date < '1000-01-01';
key_bug_features: JDBC fails to handle dates before the year 1000
